text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Very few Umamusume on the Triple Tiara tour
have ever won the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And though the Takarazuka Kinen is also fast
approaching, the spectators believe that Sweep
Tosho might just manage to pull off a victory.
